features.evidence: all right people this one is a big one here literally and figuratively this is the alienware m18 r2 and this monster is probably one of the best 18 in gaming laptops out there now alienware of course updated this from the r1 last year i will say right off the bat it s not a huge upgrade but if you could find this on sale right now as we round out 2024 head into 2025 this might be one to look at simply because this one does pack a lot of power under the hood we re looking at the core i9 14900 hx which of course is a very powerful processor 14 gen from intel it also has the rtx 490 so if you re going to be serious about gaming and want a desktop replacement this is the one to go with now it is a big monster it s got a big 18 in display qhd plus resolution 165 hz refresh rate the screen can go back as far as you see there but overall i think this is a really good now the keyboard is a mechanical keyboard it s got the cherry mx switches so very satisfying it s got a full size numpad for those number crunches that need to do some number crunching especially when you re not gaming and doing some work got a nice touchpad overall it s a really nice all metal chassis here again this is a desktop replacement it is on the big side so you re not going to be carrying this a lot but you can move it around if you need to now it does come with this pretty big and you could probably see it there it s plugged in but pretty big 360 watt power charger uses a barrel pin connection and this thing will power this monster 360 watts is nothing to sneeze at so pretty nice overall package let s find out if it s still worth it here in 2024 i anticipate getting new models coming in we re going to hear some announcements for ces but you might get this on sale at some point and maybe on sale right now we ll check the latest link in the description below but let s check out the alienware m18 r2 as we round out 2024 coming up now before we get to the unit itself i just want to let everyone know in the interest of transparency full disclosure i m not being paid by dell i m not being sponsored by dell all the opinions you re about to hear are my own dell is not getting copy approval this unit was provided by dell and once this review is done i ll be sending it back now when it comes to pricing it ranges anywhere from 15 However, i ve got two results because by default, there isn t any software to automatically lower the screen s refresh rate down to 60hz when you unplug the charger
value: average battery life in hours: 7 Hours

features.evidence: 4 combo card and that of course makes it more future proof having wi fi 7 and the wi fi bluetooth both working flawlessly no issue with either one okay let s talk about the display we re looking at an 18 in qhd plus display it has a resolution of 2560 by 1600 that means of course it has a 16 to1 aspect ratio 165 htz refresh rate 3 millisecond response time 100 rgb and of course 500 nits of brightness is what they re claiming nvidia g sync support as well now as far as the brightness i measured 300 knits of course that is a little bit on the low side i d to see it closer to 400 to be honest maybe above that but it is a matte display so you don t get any unnecessary glare or reflection so not having the brightest display is not the worst thing in the world but i would to see it brighter good coverage of the color gamut here it s got color accuracy that you d want a decent contrast here good black level good white point and best of all no pwm or screen flickering to deal with here it is an ips display something you d have to deal with oled you don t have that here so pretty good in that regard and it goes without saying having that 18 in of screen real estate is great especially if you want to be productive when not gaming and doing work it s going to be great for that in terms of seeing as much as you can on the display but of course being an 18 in display here on a pretty big device in terms of weight and size you re going to maybe look at this a desktop replacement of course you could always add an external display here for multi multi display action of course so that s pretty good as well so overall pretty good in terms of the display not the best display in the world but definitely good especially if you re going to do gaming and the fact that it is not glossy the fact that is 165 hz now i would have liked to have seen 240 hz you do get on its smaller sibling the m16 r2 but of course this one is a pretty good display in its own right now one thing i noticed here watching movies netflix amazon youtube everything worked out pretty well in terms of that but it s not an hdr display if you want hdr you ll have to connect to an external monitor but that being said at this price point i would to see hdr now one thing i did notice here as we round out the display here there is some uneven backlight bleeding that i noticed although not a deal breaker it is something you need to be aware of i d to see that improved in the next iteration all right so this is the 1080p camera here on the alienware m18 r2 for 2024 1080p as i mentioned it s an ir camera that means you can log in with face recognition with windows hello what do you think about the video quality and what do you think about the audio quality let me know now when it comes to the keyboard i m happy to report that it has the cherry mx ultra low profile mechanical keyboard and i got to tell you typing on it is really satisfying you get that clickiness of a mechanical keyboard tactility overall feedback is excellent i had no trouble typing pretty fast on this and pretty accurate at that so i having these cherry mx switches and it has the per key rgb lighting so you can play with that in the settings that has been pretty good so overall all a very good typing experience with this keyboard now for those number crunchers when you re not gaming you do have the numeric keypad and it is properly laid out i m happy to report so pretty good in that regard as well for those that need to have an numpad now the touchpad is pretty good here it s got a multi touch just to control there and of course it has integrated scrolling that has worked out really well so everything worked as you d expect with it it s not a haptic touch p so just keep that in mind but a good touchpad nonetheless i don t have a real complaint with that and this is packing a pretty big punch under the hood this is rocking the core i9 14900 hx 24 cores eight performance cores 16 efficient cores with a total of 32 threads and the single core multi core performance on this are pretty much off the charts very powerful performance this is going to be a desktop replacement due to sheer size big screen of course and that will be really good for doing everyday tasks not only gaming with aaa gaming but you re going to be able to do things video editing in premiere pro the vinci resolve 4k video editing was very good on this so i really recommend this for those who want a general purpose desktop replacement don t want to have a tower and want the ability to move this around this is going to fit that bill now when it comes to the graphics you re looking at the nvidia rtx 490 175 watts total tdp here and as you can see the time spy is excellent fire strike score wildlife extreme all high end scores here very premium performance out of this graphics card there s no doubt about that and you could play your aaa titles on four 4 cas settings here and i think it goes without saying that this is not a huge improvement over last year rocking the same gpu so you re not going to see a big improvement in terms of that there are a few things here and there so if you have last year s model you re probably safe with the one you have you don t necessarily need to upgrade although if you can get this on sale that s a different story but as far as playing the games you really are not limited here the rtx 4090 is very powerful here and pretty much a great performer when it comes to playing games so no doubt about that as well and when i ran the time spy stress test to see if this will thermal throttle under heavy load good news here it got a passing score of 98

99 all the way up to 3,000 in fact that 3,000 unit which was originally 4,000 is on sale in part of one of their hot deals over at dell s website i ll leave a link to the description below now that one of course is better than the one i have here because i have 32 gb of ram 2 terab of storage that one doubles it in both categories so if you want something really maxed out at a pretty good price for what you re getting you may want to check that out links for everything will be in the description below i also link to best buy they have a skew for 2,500 but it doesn t have the 490 it has the 470 32 gb of ram and a terabyte of storage same display of course i ll leave links for everything in the description below now you have to keep in mind this is a desktop replacement it s really not that portable especially with its size and weight it comes in at 3

99 all the way up to 3,000 in fact that 3,000 unit which was originally 4,000 is on sale in part of one of their hot deals over at dell s website i ll leave a link to the description below now that one of course is better than the one i have here because i have 32 gb of ram 2 terab of storage that one doubles it in both categories so if you want something really maxed out at a pretty good price for what you re getting you may want to check that out links for everything will be in the description below i also link to best buy they have a skew for 2,500 but it doesn t have the 490 it has the 470 32 gb of ram and a terabyte of storage same display of course i ll leave links for everything in the description below now you have to keep in mind this is a desktop replacement it s really not that portable especially with its size and weight it comes in at 3 However, so not too impressive for such an expensive machine

37 lbs so it really is a lot to take with you on the go although it is portable it s not a tower or anything you can t take from room to room this is a lot more portable but again it is a desktop replacement and it does have an 18 inch display and a pretty big chassis to house all those powerful components so just keep that in mind now as far as the build it s pretty excellent they do a good job here in terms of its all metal design it s a very premium feel but it does have a gamish type of vibe to it and that s been the hallmark for alienware although they have toned it down the last couple of years it s still very much a gaming laptop or gaming desktop replacement and there s no mistaking it for that that s for sure okay let s take a look at the port selection we re going to start off on the left side we get an rj45 ethernet port it s the e5000 5g port is what they re calling it and of course next to that are two usb type a 3 However, getting inside requires unscrewing 8 phillips head screws, all the same length

4 combo card and that of course makes it more future proof having wi fi 7 and the wi fi bluetooth both working flawlessly no issue with either one okay let s talk about the display we re looking at an 18 in qhd plus display it has a resolution of 2560 by 1600 that means of course it has a 16 to1 aspect ratio 165 htz refresh rate 3 millisecond response time 100 rgb and of course 500 nits of brightness is what they re claiming nvidia g sync support as well now as far as the brightness i measured 300 knits of course that is a little bit on the low side i d to see it closer to 400 to be honest maybe above that but it is a matte display so you don t get any unnecessary glare or reflection so not having the brightest display is not the worst thing in the world but i would to see it brighter good coverage of the color gamut here it s got color accuracy that you d want a decent contrast here good black level good white point and best of all no pwm or screen flickering to deal with here it is an ips display something you d have to deal with oled you don t have that here so pretty good in that regard and it goes without saying having that 18 in of screen real estate is great especially if you want to be productive when not gaming and doing work it s going to be great for that in terms of seeing as much as you can on the display but of course being an 18 in display here on a pretty big device in terms of weight and size you re going to maybe look at this a desktop replacement of course you could always add an external display here for multi multi display action of course so that s pretty good as well so overall pretty good in terms of the display not the best display in the world but definitely good especially if you re going to do gaming and the fact that it is not glossy the fact that is 165 hz now i would have liked to have seen 240 hz you do get on its smaller sibling the m16 r2 but of course this one is a pretty good display in its own right now one thing i noticed here watching movies netflix amazon youtube everything worked out pretty well in terms of that but it s not an hdr display if you want hdr you ll have to connect to an external monitor but that being said at this price point i would to see hdr now one thing i did notice here as we round out the display here there is some uneven backlight bleeding that i noticed although not a deal breaker it is something you need to be aware of i d to see that improved in the next iteration all right so this is the 1080p camera here on the alienware m18 r2 for 2024 1080p as i mentioned it s an ir camera that means you can log in with face recognition with windows hello what do you think about the video quality and what do you think about the audio quality let me know now when it comes to the keyboard i m happy to report that it has the cherry mx ultra low profile mechanical keyboard and i got to tell you typing on it is really satisfying you get that clickiness of a mechanical keyboard tactility overall feedback is excellent i had no trouble typing pretty fast on this and pretty accurate at that so i having these cherry mx switches and it has the per key rgb lighting so you can play with that in the settings that has been pretty good so overall all a very good typing experience with this keyboard now for those number crunchers when you re not gaming you do have the numeric keypad and it is properly laid out i m happy to report so pretty good in that regard as well for those that need to have an numpad now the touchpad is pretty good here it s got a multi touch just to control there and of course it has integrated scrolling that has worked out really well so everything worked as you d expect with it it s not a haptic touch p so just keep that in mind but a good touchpad nonetheless i don t have a real complaint with that and this is packing a pretty big punch under the hood this is rocking the core i9 14900 hx 24 cores eight performance cores 16 efficient cores with a total of 32 threads and the single core multi core performance on this are pretty much off the charts very powerful performance this is going to be a desktop replacement due to sheer size big screen of course and that will be really good for doing everyday tasks not only gaming with aaa gaming but you re going to be able to do things video editing in premiere pro the vinci resolve 4k video editing was very good on this so i really recommend this for those who want a general purpose desktop replacement don t want to have a tower and want the ability to move this around this is going to fit that bill now when it comes to the graphics you re looking at the nvidia rtx 490 175 watts total tdp here and as you can see the time spy is excellent fire strike score wildlife extreme all high end scores here very premium performance out of this graphics card there s no doubt about that and you could play your aaa titles on four 4 cas settings here and i think it goes without saying that this is not a huge improvement over last year rocking the same gpu so you re not going to see a big improvement in terms of that there are a few things here and there so if you have last year s model you re probably safe with the one you have you don t necessarily need to upgrade although if you can get this on sale that s a different story but as far as playing the games you really are not limited here the rtx 4090 is very powerful here and pretty much a great performer when it comes to playing games so no doubt about that as well and when i ran the time spy stress test to see if this will thermal throttle under heavy load good news here it got a passing score of 98
